## Meeting Purpose

[Review the initial content calendar and align on strategy and process.](https://fathom.video/share/P8vLsCEP9fzknW_CYBGNXaD3g_nza3ok?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Calendar Approved:** The initial 80+ topic calendar in Airtable is approved. It balances foundational authority-building content with tactical, low-volume topics addressing specific pain points like "AI agent sprawl."](https://fathom.video/share/P8vLsCEP9fzknW_CYBGNXaD3g_nza3ok?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [**ITSM Priority:** ITSM is now a high-priority go-to-market motion. The calendar will be expanded with ITSM-focused topics, using a task-based approach (e.g., "AI for contract management") to create white-space content.](https://fathom.video/share/P8vLsCEP9fzknW_CYBGNXaD3g_nza3ok?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Sales Enablement Focus:** Initial articles will include tactical content for the sales team to ensure immediate value and prevent team skepticism about the strategy's relevance.](https://fathom.video/share/P8vLsCEP9fzknW_CYBGNXaD3g_nza3ok?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [**Process & Tools:** The team will adopt a 2-week lead time for new requests to maintain a 5-article production backlog. A Looker dashboard for performance tracking and CMS publishing automation via Atlas are also being implemented.](https://fathom.video/share/P8vLsCEP9fzknW_CYBGNXaD3g_nza3ok?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)

## Topics

### Content Calendar Strategy

  - [The initial calendar (80+ topics) is in Airtable, focused on the "AI agent fundamentals" and "AI agent orchestration" clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/P8vLsCEP9fzknW_CYBGNXaD3g_nza3ok?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [**Strategy:** Balance foundational authority-building content with tactical, low-volume topics addressing specific pain points.](https://fathom.video/share/P8vLsCEP9fzknW_CYBGNXaD3g_nza3ok?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
      - [**Foundational:** "Agentic AI vs. Generative AI"](https://fathom.video/share/P8vLsCEP9fzknW_CYBGNXaD3g_nza3ok?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
      - [**Tactical:** "What causes agentic AI failures," "AI agent sprawl"](https://fathom.video/share/P8vLsCEP9fzknW_CYBGNXaD3g_nza3ok?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [**Competitive Strategy:** Avoid head-to-head comparisons (e.g., ServiceNow) to build a foundation first.](https://fathom.video/share/P8vLsCEP9fzknW_CYBGNXaD3g_nza3ok?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
      - [**Approach:** Use "best listicles" ("Best AI Orchestration Tools") and "alternatives to" articles to position Elementum.](https://fathom.video/share/P8vLsCEP9fzknW_CYBGNXaD3g_nza3ok?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)

### ITSM & Sales Enablement

  - [**ITSM Priority:** ITSM is a new high-priority go-to-market motion.](https://fathom.video/share/P8vLsCEP9fzknW_CYBGNXaD3g_nza3ok?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [**Action:** Expand the ITSM cluster with more topics.](https://fathom.video/share/P8vLsCEP9fzknW_CYBGNXaD3g_nza3ok?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
      - [**Method:** Create white-space content by focusing on specific tasks AI can support (e.g., "AI for supplier bid analysis") rather than competing with established players.](https://fathom.video/share/P8vLsCEP9fzknW_CYBGNXaD3g_nza3ok?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [**Sales Enablement:** Initial articles will include tactical content for the sales team to ensure immediate value.](https://fathom.video/share/P8vLsCEP9fzknW_CYBGNXaD3g_nza3ok?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Prevent team skepticism ("What are you talking about?") and provide reps with assets to use in deals.](https://fathom.video/share/P8vLsCEP9fzknW_CYBGNXaD3g_nza3ok?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
      - [**Action:** Andrew will share sales requests to inform the strategy, with Aida filtering out purely creative/tactical asks.](https://fathom.video/share/P8vLsCEP9fzknW_CYBGNXaD3g_nza3ok?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)

### Process & Tools

  - [**Content Calendar Agility:** A 2-week lead time is ideal for new requests to maintain a 5-article production backlog. The process is flexible for urgent pivots.](https://fathom.video/share/P8vLsCEP9fzknW_CYBGNXaD3g_nza3ok?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)
  - [**Performance Tracking:** A Looker dashboard (GSC + GA4 data) is live to monitor content performance.](https://fathom.video/share/P8vLsCEP9fzknW_CYBGNXaD3g_nza3ok?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
      - [**Key Metric:** LLM referral traffic, which shows high engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/P8vLsCEP9fzknW_CYBGNXaD3g_nza3ok?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
      - [**Future:** Aida is setting up custom prompts in the "Check That" AI visibility platform to track Elementum's presence in LLM answers.](https://fathom.video/share/P8vLsCEP9fzknW_CYBGNXaD3g_nza3ok?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
  - [**Publishing Automation:** The team will automate publishing from Airtable to the CMS using Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/P8vLsCEP9fzknW_CYBGNXaD3g_nza3ok?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [**Workflow:** Draft approved → Final text pasted into Atlas → Pushed to CMS → Manual final check & publish.](https://fathom.video/share/P8vLsCEP9fzknW_CYBGNXaD3g_nza3ok?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
  - [**Visuals:** The current "light on dark, line drawing" style will be maintained for brand consistency. Andrew will share the first call deck for visual inspiration.](https://fathom.video/share/P8vLsCEP9fzknW_CYBGNXaD3g_nza3ok?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)

## Next Steps

      - [Expand the ITSM topic cluster in the Airtable calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/P8vLsCEP9fzknW_CYBGNXaD3g_nza3ok?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
      - [Share the calibration article draft this week.](https://fathom.video/share/P8vLsCEP9fzknW_CYBGNXaD3g_nza3ok?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
      - [Prepare visual examples based on the first call deck.](https://fathom.video/share/P8vLsCEP9fzknW_CYBGNXaD3g_nza3ok?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)
      - [Set up custom prompts in the "Check That" AI visibility platform.](https://fathom.video/share/P8vLsCEP9fzknW_CYBGNXaD3g_nza3ok?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
